overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game showing a rainy neon-lit cyberpunk city skyline at dusk. The camera remains fixed on a high rooftop vantage point overlooking the city as rain falls steadily, with a single flying vehicle briefly crossing the frame.

segments.scene_description: A static view from a high vantage point overlooking a sprawling cyberpunk cityscape at dusk. Rain falls steadily over the neon-lit skyline, with the wet rooftop surface reflecting the ambient light. The softsys neon sign glows prominently on the right side of the frame.

segments.scene_description: The scene remains largely unchanged as rain continues to fall over the neon cityscape. A flying vehicle enters from the right and traverses the sky horizontally, adding momentary motion to the otherwise static rainy evening view before exiting left.

segments.scene_description: The flying vehicle exits the frame, leaving the scene as it was initially - a quiet, rain-soaked view of the neon-lit cyberpunk city skyline at dusk. The camera maintains its fixed position as rain continues to fall over the urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a rain-soaked cyberpunk skyline at dusk that remains constant despite a brief moment of aerial activity. It begins with a high vantage point overlooking a sprawling neon-lit city, where steady rain falls over a wet rooftop that reflects the ambient glow of a prominent softsys sign. As the rain continues to descend, a single flying vehicle enters from the right and traverses the horizon horizontally, introducing a fleeting sense of motion to the urban expanse. The scene then returns to its initial stillness as the vehicle exits to the left, leaving the camera to linger on the quiet, neon-drenched landscape. Finally, the view settles back into a meditative state, maintaining its fixed position over the enduring rainfall and the distant city lights.
